global_description: A small, slender bird with a rounded body and a short tail. It has a brown-streaked back and wings, a grayish-white underbelly, and a distinctive rusty cap on its head. The bird's beak is short and conical, suited for seed eating.

part_details.head: Rusty cap with a grayish face and a dark eye line.
part_details.back: Brown with darker streaks, blending into the wings.
part_details.wings: Brown with dark streaks, matching the back.
part_details.beak: Short, conical, and dark, ideal for seeds.

spatial_relations: The rusty cap covers the top of the head.
The brown-streaked wings extend from the sides of the back.
The grayish-white underbelly is below the wings and back.
The short beak is positioned at the front of the head.
